perf_hint: a 3x3 voronoi search per pixel and one onset read, so frame time scales with pixel count alone — on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: cells
params.description: How many panes span the short edge of the window.

params.name: jitter
params.description: How irregular the panes are; 0 is a square grid.

params.name: lead
params.description: How wide the dark lead seams between panes are.

params.name: reshatter
params.description: Whether every hit re-leads the window into a new mosaic.

params.name: glow
params.description: How brightly a pane glows when its band speaks.

params.name: flash
params.description: How hard a hit flares the freshly re-leaded glass.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts through the window.
